title: herniaria fontanesii subvar. glabrescens
intro: Herniaria fontanesii subvar. glabrescens is a subspecies of the kidney clover plant, a type of herbaceous perennial that belongs to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Herniaria fontanesii subvar. glabrescens include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate gastrointestinal problems, and provide relief from rheumatic and arthritic pain. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
